description: Part of a ketubba. Bride: Muʾnisa bt. [...] (מונסה) and [...]danan b. Abraham. Marriage payment 5+10. Dowry items preserved =22 dinars (but clearly a lot of items are missing from this sum). The date is not preserved. Witnessed by Shemuel b. Aharon ha-Kohen, [...]ya b. Yosef, Yehuda b. Yefet ha-Kohen, Shaʿyā b. Raḥīm, Yāfet b. Natʾel (יאפת בר נתאל) (=Yefet b. Netanʾel?), Shelomo b. Yiṣḥaq and Shabbat b. Ṣalaḥ. In the hand of Yefet b. David (active ca. 1014–57 CE).
